entries.name: Creeper Head
entries.description: Blocky creeper head with the classic frown face — raised dark relief on a mossy-green cube.

entries.name: Super Mario ? Block
entries.description: Classic Super Mario question-mark block: a warm-yellow cube with brown corner rivets and a bold ? glyph.

entries.name: Portal Companion Cube
entries.description: Portal Weighted Companion Cube — light-gray cube with pink hearts on each face and steel edge bars.

entries.name: Space Invader
entries.description: The classic 8-bit "crab" Space Invader sprite, extruded as a lime-green pixel-art slab.

entries.name: Pac-Man & Ghost
entries.description: Iconic arcade duo — yellow Pac-Man with a wedge mouth beside a red ghost with eyes.

entries.name: Castle Tower
entries.description: Round stone tower with crenellated battlements, a blue conical roof, and arched door and windows.

entries.name: Heraldic Shield
entries.description: A knight's shield quartered in red, blue, gold, and silver with a central gold boss.

entries.name: Treasure Chest
entries.description: Pirate treasure chest with a rounded lid, gold trim straps, and a gold lock plate.

entries.name: Chess King
entries.description: Turned ivory chess king with a tiered base, crown collar, and cross finial.

entries.name: Royal Crown
entries.description: A king's gold crown with pointed peaks and red, blue, and green jewels set around the band.

entries.name: Arcade Cabinet
entries.description: Classic upright arcade cabinet with a marquee, screen, joystick, buttons, and coin slot.

entries.name: Cassette Tape
entries.description: Retro audio cassette with reel windows and a cream label strip.

entries.name: Handheld Console
entries.description: Game Boy-style handheld with a green screen, D-pad, action buttons, and speaker grille.

entries.name: Boombox
entries.description: 80s boombox with twin speaker grilles, a cassette deck, control buttons, and a carry handle.

entries.name: Pixel Heart
entries.description: 8-bit pixel heart built from unit cubes — bold red with a highlight shine.

entries.name: Low-Poly Fox
entries.description: A stylized low-poly fox with a pointed snout, triangular ears, bushy tail, and dark leg socks.

entries.name: Lighthouse
entries.description: A striped lighthouse with red and white bands, a glass lamp room, and a black dome cap.

entries.name: Hot Air Balloon
entries.description: A colorful balloon with alternating red, yellow, and blue gores and a basket hanging below.

entries.name: D20 Die
entries.description: A 20-sided polyhedral die (icosahedron) built via hull, with a gold face marking the 20.

entries.name: Toadstool Mushroom
entries.description: A red toadstool with white polka-dot spots painted as smooth rounded patches using the paintStroke brush.

entries.name: Twisted Vase
entries.description: Stacked rotated rings forming a hex-faceted twisted profile.

entries.name: Christmas Tree
entries.description: Low-poly tiered tree with a stellated octahedron star on top.

entries.name: Chess Rook
entries.description: Hollow chess rook with crenellations cut from the parapet.

entries.name: OpenSCAD: Twisted
entries.description: Twisted star column via OpenSCAD's linear_extrude.

entries.name: Retro Rocket
entries.description: Classic retro rocket with ogive nose cone, fins, porthole window, and thrust nozzle.

entries.name: Spiral Staircase
entries.description: A 16-step helical staircase around a central column, topped by a circular platform and balusters. Built with the spiralPattern helper for the steps and railing posts.

entries.name: Geodesic Lantern
entries.description: A faceted dome lantern with two rings of cylindrical window cutouts and a small spire finial. Showcases circularPattern, placeOn, and the expectUnion safety net.

entries.name: Wall Clock Face
entries.description: 100mm-diameter clock face with 12 hour markers, 60 minute ticks, and tapered hour + minute hands posed at 10:10. Built with the circularPattern radius shortcut.

entries.name: Honeycomb Planter
entries.description: A cylindrical planter pot with a staggered honeycomb pattern carved through its wall. Built with nested linearPattern + circularPattern and the expectUnion connectivity check.

entries.name: Wind Turbine
entries.description: A tapered tower with a nacelle, hub, and 3 swept blades — plus a service ladder up the tower face. Showcases placeOn for the nacelle and circularPattern with a non-Z axis for the rotor.

entries.name: Hex Bolt & Nut Set
entries.description: M16x3 hex bolt, matching nut, and washer laid out side-by-side. Showcases BOSL2's screw() and nut() — real threaded geometry that manifold-js can't easily reproduce.

entries.name: Spur Gear Pair
entries.description: Two meshing involute spur gears on a rounded base plate, with tooth offset so they interlock correctly. Built with BOSL2's spur_gear() and gear_dist().

entries.name: Pipe Tee Fitting
entries.description: A 3-way plumbing tee fitting with flared collars and a connected interior cavity. Built with BOSL2's xcyl()/zcyl() axis-aligned cylinders and cyl(chamfer1=) for the flared collar edges.

entries.name: Modular Drawer Bin
entries.description: A stackable storage bin with two compartments, rounded corners, and stacking lugs. Built with BOSL2's cuboid(rounding=) for filleted edges, plus translate-and-anchor cyl() placement for the lugs.

entries.name: SDF Organic Creature
entries.description: A smooth-blended creature built entirely from SDF primitives — showcases smoothUnion for organic body welds and paint-by-label colourisation of an SDF model.

entries.name: SDF Gyroid Chamber
entries.description: A triply-periodic gyroid lattice clipped inside a solid frame — the SDF way to do 3D-printable infill in one expression.

entries.name: SDF Twisted Vessel
entries.description: A spiralled body produced by the SDF `.twist()` domain warp on a non-radially-symmetric profile, joined to a base with smoothUnion.

entries.name: SDF + Manifold Mechanical Part
entries.description: A mechanical part that mixes smooth-blended SDF features (grip, fillets) with crisp Manifold CSG (mounting plate, drilled holes) — shows how the two engines compose.

entries.name: SDF Bloom
entries.description: A stylised flower showcasing the SDF combinators — ellipsoid petals fanned out with polarArray (no hand-written coordinates), a flattened pollen centre, and a taper-narrowed stem. Three painted regions.

entries.name: Vintage Rangefinder Camera
entries.description: A classic 35mm rangefinder camera with a chrome top plate, leatherette body, a fixed lens with a dark recessed front element, twin viewfinder windows, a brass shutter release, and a wind-lever knob.

entries.name: Smiley Cactus
entries.description: A cheerful potted saguaro with two upraised arms, a pink flower bud on its crown, and two little black bead eyes — sitting in a flared terracotta pot with rim and soil.

entries.name: Studio Microphone
entries.description: Classic large-diaphragm studio condenser microphone cradled in a U-shaped shock-mount yoke on a weighted desktop stand, with a coiled cable looping back to the base.

entries.name: Vintage Biplane
entries.description: A WW1-era biplane with stacked canvas wings, a tapered fuselage, a yellow engine cowling, a two-blade wooden propeller, and a swept tail fin.

entries.name: Pipe Flange
entries.description: An ANSI-style pipe flange with a 6-bolt circle, central bore, chamfered face, and beveled neck — showcasing BREP's exact selective edge filleting on a mechanically realistic part.

entries.name: Machine Tool Knob
entries.description: A precision machine-tool grip knob with a finger-grip skirt, chamfered top, domed crown, and a shaft bore — showcasing BREP's exact chamfers and fillets on rotational geometry.

entries.name: Butt Hinge
entries.description: A classic interlocking butt hinge: two flat leaves, three knuckles, and a continuous pin — showcasing BREP's exact cylindrical surfaces and clean selective fillets.

entries.name: V-Groove Pulley
entries.description: A precision V-belt pulley wheel with a beveled drive groove around its circumference, a central hub bore, and chamfered side rims — showcasing BREP's exact rotational geometry and angled surfaces.

entries.name: Precision L-Bracket
entries.description: A right-angle steel bracket with a large concave fillet on the inside web, rounded outer tip edges, and four mounting holes — showcasing BREP's exact selective edge rounding.

entries.name: Project Enclosure
entries.description: A rectangular electronics-project enclosure shell with rounded outer corners, an inset lid lip, PCB mounting bosses, and side ventilation slots — showcasing BREP's exact filleted shells.

entries.name: Robot Buddy
entries.description: A friendly retro desktop robot with a domed head, antenna, chest panel, and two stubby arms — colorful BREP showcase with paint.

entries.name: Bird Feeder
entries.description: A gazebo-style hanging bird feeder with conical wood roof, revolved seed reservoir, lipped dish, and circular perches — showcasing revolve + circularPattern + paint.

entries.name: Pendant Chandelier
entries.description: A 5-arm pendant chandelier with brass arms, glass bulbs, central canopy, and a decorative finial — showcasing BREP.circularPattern + paint.

entries.name: Wall Clock
entries.description: A classic round analog wall clock with chamfered bezel, painted hour markers, hour + minute hands, and a center spindle — showcasing circularPattern + paint.

entries.name: Vintage Camera
entries.description: A vintage rangefinder camera with a tapered lens barrel, viewfinder, shutter button, and film advance — colorful BREP showcase with paint.

entries.name: Coastal Lighthouse
entries.description: A tall round lighthouse with red-and-white tower stripes, balcony railing, domed lantern, and conical cap — colorful BREP showcase with paint.

entries.name: Coffee Mug
entries.description: A white ceramic coffee mug with a colored rim band, painted coffee inside, and a curved torus handle — showcasing BREP's shell op + paint.

entries.name: SDF TPMS Study
entries.description: Four 14³ lattice tiles side-by-side on a plinth — Schwarz P, Diamond, Lidinoid, and a gradedGyroid with a diagonal thickness ramp. The exhaustive TPMS comparison; five painted regions.

entries.name: SDF Aetherjelly
entries.description: A radial jellyfish-drifter built from ellipsoids, fanned into shape by polarArray (8 tentacles, 6 ocelli), bilaterally completed by mirrorPair, and tapered along its body axis. Three painted regions; the showcase for the SDF combinators.

entries.name: SDF Helix Lamp Standard
entries.description: An architectural light post whose square-cross-section shaft spirals around an OFFSET vertical axis, paired with a perforated screen wall built by repeat() clipped to a slab and topped by a roundedCylinder lamp cap. Four painted regions; showcases the new offset-twist, repeat, and roundedCylinder primitives.

entries.name: SDF 28-Tooth Spur Wheel
entries.description: A spur/turbine wheel — single tooth (roundedBox + taper) folded 28-fold via polarRepeat, plus a 6-hole polarArray lightening web and a bored central hub. The canonical "polarArray for low counts, polarRepeat for high" showcase, in three painted regions.

entries.name: SDF Perforated Faceplate
entries.description: A speaker-style faceplate built on the finite-count repeatN combinator — a 7×5 grid of through-holes subtracted from a rounded slab, a recessed bezel, and a 4×1 row of LED-indicator bumps. The textbook "no intersect needed" case in three painted regions.

entries.name: SDF Graded TPMS Study
entries.description: A femur-inspired model exercising all three new graded TPMS variants: gradedSchwarzP for the cortical shaft (radial density), gradedDiamond for the marrow canal (axial trabecular grading), and gradedLidinoid for the femoral head (spherical-radial). Five painted regions.

entries.name: SDF Running-Bond Brick Wall
entries.description: A classic running-bond brick wall — bricks tiled via repeatN({stagger: {along: x, by: y}}), the new option for brick/honeycomb patterns. Every other course shifts by half a brick. Two painted regions on a recessed mortar slab.

entries.name: Striped Lighthouse
entries.description: A parametric tapered lighthouse with alternating red/white bands, a railed gallery, and a domed lantern room glowing around a central light.

entries.name: Parametric Storage Tray
entries.description: Customizable rounded storage tray — adjust size, wall/floor thickness, corner style, and internal dividers via the Parameters panel.

entries.name: Parametric Control Knob
entries.description: Customizable control knob/dial — set diameter, height, grip count and style (knurled/fluted/smooth), center bore, and pointer via the Parameters panel.

entries.name: Parametric Vent Panel
entries.description: Customizable perforated honeycomb/vent panel — set size, thickness, cell size/shape (hex/square/round), wall, and an optional border frame via the Parameters panel.

entries.name: Daisy Flower
entries.description: A cheerful parametric daisy with a domed pollen center, a fan of radial petals, a tapering stem, and a pair of leaves.

entries.name: Rainbow Ring Stacker
entries.description: A parametric take on the classic children's stacking toy: a domed base, a tapered center post, and a free-sliding stack of rainbow donut rings of decreasing size.

entries.name: Rocket Ship
entries.description: A retro toy rocket with a parametric body, nose cone, ring of tail fins, a round porthole window, and a flared exhaust nozzle.

entries.name: Toadstool Mushroom
entries.description: A storybook Amanita toadstool with a flared, spotted red cap on a rounded cream stem, fully parametric from cap size to spot count.

entries.name: Traffic Light
entries.description: A parametric three-lamp traffic signal with red, amber, and green lenses recessed into a rounded housing, plus optional sun visors and a mounting post.

entries.name: Layer Cake
entries.description: A self-coloring parametric layer cake: colors live in the model code via api.label(shape, name, { color }), so it renders painted with no paint step and the editor stays editable. Set the frosting color and tier count in the Parameters panel.

entries.name: Country Manor Estate
entries.description: A symmetric Palladian-style country manor with projecting end wings, a columned entrance portico, grand pediment and crest, hipped roofs ringed by balustrades, dormer windows, clustered chimneys with clay pots, and a central rooftop cupola — self-colored via labeled regions for multi-color prints.
